source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for crisp English metrics UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese dashboards, status labels, and numeric product surfaces.
layout: Graceful 8px metrics grids, long-leg spacing rhythm, black-stripe separators, horn-ring texture, measured shadows, and balanced dashboard density.

prompts.label: Transparent gazelle profile motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Gazelle transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a graceful gazelle profile mammal motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A slender gazelle in elegant side profile, fawn tan coat, white belly and facial markings, crisp black eye stripe, black tail tip, fine ringed horns, long legs, alert ears, subtle acacia-savanna warm reflected tones. Anatomical accuracy, crisp subject edges, graceful metric-system identity, no antelope herd, no deer, no impala confusion.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full gazelle body, head, horns, legs, hooves, and tail without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no landscape, no grass, no acacia tree props, no second animal, no text, no watermark, no floor plane, no shadow.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Gazelle light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Gazelle", derived from the visible gazelle profile cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible graceful metrics system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, target 3840 x 2160. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Gazelle, Gazelle Profile, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from fawn tan coat, white belly and facial markings, black eye stripe and tail tip, horn graphite, acacia-savanna dry greens, warm sand surfaces, and crisp high-contrast profile markings. The board must read as gazelle and graceful metrics, not deer, horse, generic tan UI, or safari poster.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Metrics, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, data table rows, search command palette, left navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar/donut charts, KPI deltas, queue table, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, warm white background, fawn primary actions, white-marking surfaces, black-stripe text and borders, acacia green focus/success accents, horn graphite neutral depth, subtle short-fur and horn-ring texture. Use large readable labels, avoid dense tiny token tables.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no cartoon animal, no landscape photo, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Gazelle", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Gazelle dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Gazelle". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible gazelle profile cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, target 3840 x 2160. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Gazelle, Gazelle Profile, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve the gazelle system language: fawn tan primary actions, white marking foreground text, black stripe dark surfaces and borders, horn graphite neutral panels, acacia green success/focus, savanna gold warnings, dry earth dividers, subtle short-fur and horn-ring texture, precise 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as gazelle and graceful metrics, not deer, horse, generic tan UI, or safari poster.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Metrics, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, data table rows, search command palette, left navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar/donut charts, KPI deltas, queue table, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep black-stripe and horn-graphite backgrounds, warm white foreground, fawn tan active controls, acacia green status and focus rings, savanna gold warning accents, dry-earth separators, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls, subtle motif texture overlays. Use large readable labels, avoid dense tiny token tables.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no cartoon animal, no landscape photo, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Gazelle", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
